description_long: This is a large, upright arcade game cabinet designed for immersive racing gameplay, specifically for the game 'Wangan Midnight Maximum Tune 4.' The cabinet features a prominent, high-backed red seat attached to a black base, with a control panel in front that includes a steering wheel, buttons, and a gear shifter. The front of the cabinet displays a large screen for gameplay, surrounded by a black bezel and topped with a colorful marquee displaying the game's title and Japanese text. The side panels are mostly black with red accents, and the overall structure is robust, likely made from a combination of plastic, metal, and wood. The control panel is equipped with various interactive elements, and a cup holder is visible on the left side. The cabinet is designed to be placed in public entertainment spaces and is not intended for easy movement.
description: A robust, upright racing arcade game cabinet with a red seat, black body, and a prominent game marquee for 'Wangan Midnight Maximum Tune 4.' The cabinet features a large screen, interactive control panel, and cup holder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red seat, black base, and the control panel with steering wheel and cup holder.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid black back panel and the red accents on the upper section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the seat, control panel, and the structure of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the screen, control panel with buttons and steering wheel, and the colorful marquee at the top.
attribute_screen_type: Flat display, likely LCD, with a wide rectangular shape and a black bezel surrounding the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a central steering wheel, gear shifter on the right, several buttons, and a cup holder on the left; controls are spaced for ergonomic access.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Wangan Midnight Maximum Tune 4' logo with bold white and red text, Japanese characters, and a dynamic racing theme.
